title: Generative AI for leaders
description:
This course features Coursera Coach!
A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

Generative AI is rapidly transforming the business world, and this course provides leaders with the tools and insights to leverage it for effective decision-making and strategic success. You will gain a comprehensive understanding of how generative AI can improve leadership capabilities, from mastering prompt patterns to navigating ethical concerns. By the end of the course, you'll be equipped with practical strategies to integrate AI into everyday leadership practices.

The course starts by exploring the core concepts of generative AI, its impact on the future of work, and how it can be used to enhance decision-making. You'll learn about the key aspects of prompt patterns and in-context learning, ensuring you're ready to make the most of AI in your role.

As you progress, you will dive into real-world applications like leadership transition planning, agenda creation, and HR conversations. You'll also explore scenario planning, risk management, and conflict resolution, all through the lens of generative AI's capabilities.

This course is ideal for current or aspiring leaders looking to stay ahead of the curve in AI-driven environments. No prior AI knowledge is required, though a basic understanding of leadership principles will be helpful. The course is beginner-friendly but offers deep, actionable insights for those at any stage in their leadership journey.
